title: NysnÃ¸ Invests in Hystar AS to Accelerate Global Growth of Green Hydrogen
content: NysnÃ¸ is investing in Hystar AS, a leading Norwegian high-tech hydrogen company. The investment will enable Hystar to execute its growth strategy and contribute to the energy transition, through large scale deployment of its highly efficient green hydrogen technology. NysnÃ¸ is investing alongside Orlen VC, MOL Switch, Stenshagen Invest, Kinetics Technologies, AP Ventures, Firda, Nippon Steel Trading, Finindus and Sintef Ventures.
author: Vineeth Chellakannu
